title: South Chinaâ€™s Largest Hydrogen Refueling Station Opens in Guangzhou
content: The largest hydrogen refueling station in South China has been completed and put into operation in Guangzhouâ€™s Baiyun district. It has a maximum daily refueling capacity of 4,000 kilograms, equivalent to the total of four typical medium-sized hydrogen refueling stations. The station will effectively address the hydrogen supply bottleneck in the region and meet the concentrated refueling needs of large logistics vehicles and buses.
author: Analysts Account
